seo.title: California Auto Repair | Trusted Auto Mechanic in Dallas, TX
seo.description: California Auto Repair in Dallas, TX offers expert auto repair, maintenance, and diagnostics. Honest service, fair prices. Call (214) 391-8687 today.

hero.headline: Expert Auto Repair You Can Rely On
hero.subheadline: From routine maintenance to major repairs, our skilled mechanics deliver quality service with transparency and care.

featureSections.title: All Makes and Models, All Repairs
featureSections.body: Whether you drive a sedan, SUV, or truck, our certified technicians have the expertise to handle everything from oil changes to engine overhauls. We use state-of-the-art diagnostic equipment to pinpoint issues quickly and accurately.
featureSections.cardBody: Our advanced scanners read your vehicle's computer to identify problems fast, saving you time and money.

featureSections.title: Honest Advice, Fair Prices
featureSections.body: We believe in transparent communication. Before any work begins, we explain the issue, provide a detailed estimate, and get your approval. No hidden fees, no upselling.
featureSections.cardBody: We empower you with knowledge about your vehicle's health, so you can make informed decisions.

whyChooseUs.title: Certified Technicians
whyChooseUs.description: Our team holds ASE certifications and undergoes continuous training to stay current with the latest automotive technology.

whyChooseUs.title: Fast Turnaround
whyChooseUs.description: We respect your time. Most repairs are completed the same day, and we offer loaner vehicles for longer jobs.

whyChooseUs.title: Transparent Pricing
whyChooseUs.description: You'll never be surprised by hidden costs. We provide clear, upfront estimates and explain every recommendation.

whyChooseUs.title: Guaranteed Workmanship
whyChooseUs.description: All repairs are backed by our comprehensive warranty, ensuring your peace of mind on the road.

testimonials.quote: I've been bringing my car here for years. They always explain what's needed and the prices are fair. Highly recommend!
testimonials.author: Mike R.

testimonials.quote: Fast, honest, and reliable. They fixed my transmission in two days and it's been running perfectly ever since.
testimonials.author: Jessica T.

testimonials.quote: Best auto shop in Dallas! They saved me hundreds compared to the dealership. Great customer service too.
testimonials.author: Carlos M.

cta.headline: Ready to Get Your Car Running Smoothly?
cta.subheadline: Schedule your appointment today and experience the California Auto Repair difference.

servicesPage.intro: At California Auto Repair, we offer a full range of automotive services to keep your vehicle safe and reliable. From routine maintenance to complex repairs, our skilled technicians have you covered.

services.title: Engine Diagnostics & Repair
services.shortDescription: Accurate diagnostics and expert engine repair to restore performance.
services.longDescription: Our advanced diagnostic tools quickly identify engine issues, from check engine lights to performance problems. We repair or replace components with precision, using quality parts to ensure long-lasting results.
benefits: Peace of mind with warranty coverage

process.title: Computer Scan
process.description: We connect your vehicle to our diagnostic system to retrieve trouble codes and live data.

process.title: In-Depth Inspection
process.description: Our technician performs a thorough inspection to confirm the root cause of the issue.

process.title: Repair & Test
process.description: We complete the necessary repairs and test-drive your vehicle to ensure everything is running smoothly.

faqs.question: How long does an engine diagnostic take?
faqs.answer: Most diagnostic scans take about 30-60 minutes. Complex issues may require additional time for thorough inspection.

faqs.question: Do you use OEM parts for engine repairs?
faqs.answer: We use high-quality OEM and aftermarket parts that meet or exceed manufacturer specifications, ensuring reliability and performance.

services.title: Brake Services
services.shortDescription: Complete brake inspection, repair, and replacement for safety.
services.longDescription: Your safety depends on reliable brakes. We inspect pads, rotors, calipers, and fluid to identify wear and address issues promptly. Our brake services restore stopping power and prevent costly damage.

process.title: Brake Inspection
process.description: We check pad thickness, rotor condition, caliper function, and fluid levels.

process.title: Component Replacement
process.description: Worn parts are replaced with quality components, and the system is properly lubricated.

process.title: Test Drive
process.description: We test the brakes at various speeds to ensure smooth, responsive operation.

faqs.question: How often should I replace my brake pads?
faqs.answer: Typically every 30,000-70,000 miles depending on driving habits. We recommend an inspection at every oil change.

faqs.question: What are signs of brake problems?
faqs.answer: Squealing or grinding noises, a soft brake pedal, vibration when braking, or longer stopping distances indicate service is needed.

services.title: Oil Changes & Maintenance
services.shortDescription: Regular oil changes and preventive maintenance to keep your car healthy.
services.longDescription: Routine oil changes are the lifeblood of your engine. We use quality oils and filters, and our multi-point inspection catches minor issues before they become major repairs. Stay on schedule with our maintenance reminders.

process.title: Drain Old Oil
process.description: We safely drain the old oil and dispose of it responsibly.

process.title: Replace Filter & Add New Oil
process.description: A new oil filter is installed, and we add the correct grade and quantity of fresh oil.

process.title: Multi-Point Inspection
process.description: We check fluid levels, belts, hoses, tires, and lights, providing a full vehicle health report.

faqs.question: What type of oil does my car need?
faqs.answer: We follow manufacturer recommendations, using conventional, synthetic blend, or full synthetic oil as specified for your vehicle.

faqs.question: How often should I get an oil change?
faqs.answer: Most modern vehicles need an oil change every 5,000-7,500 miles. Check your owner's manual for the exact interval.

services.title: AC & Heating Repair
services.shortDescription: Keep your cabin comfortable with expert AC and heating diagnostics.
services.longDescription: A malfunctioning AC or heater can make driving miserable. We diagnose and repair all climate control systems, from refrigerant leaks to blower motor failures. Enjoy comfortable driving year-round.

process.title: System Check
process.description: We test pressure, temperature, and airflow to identify the problem.

process.title: Leak Detection & Repair
process.description: Using UV dye and electronic detectors, we find and fix leaks, then recharge the system.

process.title: Performance Verification
process.description: We run the system to ensure proper operation and comfortable cabin temperatures.

faqs.question: Why is my AC blowing warm air?
faqs.answer: Common causes include low refrigerant, a faulty compressor, or a clogged condenser. We'll diagnose the exact issue.

faqs.question: How often should I service my car's AC?
faqs.answer: We recommend an AC check every two years or if you notice reduced cooling performance, strange noises, or odors.

about.headline: Your Trusted Local Auto Repair Team
about.mission: To provide honest, high-quality automotive repair services that keep Dallas drivers safe and satisfied.
story: California Auto Repair was founded with a simple mission: deliver expert auto repair with integrity. Our owner, a seasoned mechanic with over 15 years of experience, saw a need for a shop that prioritized customer education and fair pricing over profit. Starting with a small team, we built a reputation for reliability one vehicle at a time.

Today, we serve drivers across Dallas with a full range of services, from routine oil changes to complex engine overhauls. Our certified technicians stay ahead of the curve with ongoing training, and our commitment to transparency means every customer knows exactly what their car needs and why. We're proud to be a trusted name in the community.

coreValues.title: Honesty
coreValues.description: We never recommend unnecessary repairs. Our estimates are clear and upfront.

coreValues.title: Quality
coreValues.description: We use top-tier parts and techniques to ensure repairs last.

coreValues.title: Respect
coreValues.description: We treat every customer and vehicle with care and professionalism.

coreValues.title: Community
coreValues.description: We support our local Dallas neighbors with reliable service and fair prices.

contact.headline: Get in Touch
contact.subheadline: Have a question or need to schedule service? Reach out to us today.
